name: Cheese Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Apples (pared, cored, and thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly butter an 8x8-inch or 11x7-inch square baking pan. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, 3/4 cup of sugar, 1/4 cup flour, and cinnamon. Toss together.
4. Spread the apple mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
5. In another large bowl, combine the remaining flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and cheese. Stir until combined.
6. Add the melted butter and milk to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
7. Spoon the cheese mixture over the apples in the pan.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 30-35 minutes or until the topping is crisp and golden, and the apples are tender.
9. Serve warm.
